task.title: Move bootstrap and prompt templates into CodeWiki skill assets
task.summary: Make the CodeWiki-product vs CodeWiki-dogfood boundary explicit while moving bootstrap, /wiki-resume prompt templates, and starter template assets to the CodeWiki skill asset boundary.

goal.outcome: Agents cannot confuse .codewiki/ dogfood state with package source, and bootstrap/resume prompt/template assets are owned by the CodeWiki skill while source executes them through application APIs.
acceptance: Repo prompt/skill/template language explicitly distinguishes dogfood state, generated state, runtime state, and package source.
Starter templates include canonical/generated/runtime path taxonomy guidance.
Bootstrap workflow guidance and prompt templates live under the CodeWiki skill asset boundary, with source code only exposing executable application tools or compatibility loaders.
/wiki-resume injected implementation prompts are rendered from skill-owned templates/assets rather than hard-coded application prompt text.
/wiki-resume preserves or incorporates user-supplied follow-up intent after command invocation instead of discarding it.

Resume prompt templates include selected task, artifact statuses, conflicting artifacts and holders/waiters when relevant, temporary session usage record, and helper-safe next steps for parallel sessions.
Packaged skills include required bootstrap/prompt/template assets and smoke tests prove package reachability.
Architecture/audit check detects active docs/source that call .codewiki/ package source or generated task views canonical truth.
non_goals: Do not make skills import adapters or own product semantics.
Do not remove compatibility loaders before packaging and migration tests pass.
Do not implement session queue/artifact-status scheduling policy in the template layer; TASK-086 owns allocation semantics.
verification: source-owned package/audit check verifies skill assets are reachable
/wiki-resume prompt fixture proves skill-owned template rendering, artifact-status wording, and follow-up intent preservation

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Moved bootstrap/resume prompt assets into skill boundary for TASK-083 and added source-owned loaders/rendering, follow-up intent preservation, prompt asset smoke coverage, and audit checks for dogfood/generated-view boundary misuse.

evidence: Prompt asset smoke imports source renderers and validates skill asset existence, rendering, follow-up intent parsing, and placeholder resolution.
Audit drift smoke fixture injects bad dogfood/generated-view wording and asserts source-owned audit catches it.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: /wiki-resume prompt rendering and argument parsing changed in src/application/prompt.ts and src/adapters/pi/commands/resume.ts.
Bootstrap onboarding and starter taxonomy now render from skills/codewiki/bootstrap assets.
Package audit validates skill asset reachability and dry-run inclusion.
notes: Runtime scheduler logic remains source-owned; skill assets own prose/templates only.
codewiki_claim/artifact status compatibility kept unchanged except prompt wording.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Prompt asset smoke imports source renderers and validates skill asset existence, rendering, follow-up intent parsing, and placeholder resolution.
Audit drift smoke fixture injects bad dogfood/generated-view wording and asserts source-owned audit catches it.
code_change_evidence: /wiki-resume prompt rendering and argument parsing changed in src/application/prompt.ts and src/adapters/pi/commands/resume.ts.
Bootstrap onboarding and starter taxonomy now render from skills/codewiki/bootstrap assets.
Package audit validates skill asset reachability and dry-run inclusion.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Bootstrap workflow guidance and prompt templates live under CodeWiki skill asset boundary, with source only exposing loaders/orchestration.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added skills/codewiki/bootstrap/onboarding.md, skills/codewiki/bootstrap/starter-taxonomy.md, skills/codewiki/prompts/resume-implementation.md, and src/application/skill-assets.ts loader/rendering utility.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: /wiki-resume injected implementation prompts render from skill-owned templates rather than hard-coded application prompt text.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/prompt.ts now renders prompts/resume-implementation.md via renderSkillAsset; tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs asserts rendered prompt sections and no unresolved placeholders.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: /wiki-resume preserves user-supplied follow-up intent after command invocation.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/adapters/pi/commands/resume.ts normalizeCodeArgs now returns followUpIntent and supports '-- follow-up intent' plus implicit non-path trailing intent; prompt asset smoke covers both forms.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Resume prompt templates include selected task, artifact status, holders/waiters, temporary session usage, and helper-safe next steps.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: resume-implementation.md includes selected-task and helper-safe sections; resume command describes artifact statuses with holders/waiters and temporary session usage; prompt asset smoke asserts key sections.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Starter templates include canonical/generated/runtime path taxonomy guidance.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/templates.ts injects skills/codewiki/bootstrap/starter-taxonomy.md into starter system overview; onboarding asset also calls out canonical/generated/runtime classes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Packaged skills include required assets and smoke tests prove reachability.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: auditPackage now requires/packs prompt/bootstrap assets; tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs and npm pack dry-run passed.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Architecture/audit detects docs that call .codewiki package source or generated task views canonical truth.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: audit stale-reference profile now emits dogfood-as-package-source and generated-task-view-as-truth; audit-drift smoke fixture asserts both.

closure_brief.user_intent: Proceed with TASK-083: move prompt assets into skill boundary while keeping source-owned orchestration.
implemented_changes: Added skill-owned resume, onboarding, and starter taxonomy templates under skills/codewiki.
Added source-owned skill asset loader and rendered /wiki-resume and bootstrap prompts from those assets.
Preserved /wiki-resume follow-up intent and enriched artifact-status prompt context with holders/waiters and session usage.
Added prompt asset smoke coverage and audit drift checks for dogfood/generated-view boundary misuse.
Updated README, skill docs, and file-structure docs to reflect skill-owned prompt assets and source-owned gateway semantics.
acceptance_evidence: All TASK-083 acceptance criteria mapped to code/assets/tests in this implementation build.
Checks passed, including full npm test and npm pack dry-run.
non_goals_preserved: Skills do not import adapters or own scheduler/product semantics.
Compatibility loaders remain; no codewiki_claim removal.
remaining_risks: Needs fresh validation report before closure.

risks: Fresh implementation validation still required before commit/closure.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-083 Move bootstrap and prompt templates into CodeWiki skill assets implementation evidence
commit.body:
Moved bootstrap/resume prompt assets into skill boundary for TASK-083 and added source-owned loaders/rendering, follow-up intent preservation, prompt asset smoke coverage, and audit checks for dogfood/generated-view boundary misuse.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/resume-scheduler.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/audit-drift.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/audit.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke, npm run check:architecture, npm test
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
